data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) dispatchPreamble() correctly varies wrapper by step — review steps get review-oriented language, implementation steps get implementation-biased language; threaded through initial dispatch, parent dispatch, and take-loop paths. (2) kno claim non-zero exit-code guard present in all 3 prompt paths in knots-backend.ts. (3) Regression test in terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts exercises take-loop review preamble switch — 12/12 tests pass. (4) All 4 commits tagged with commit: prefix. (5) CI green on main (d184a7e1). No regressions found.
